title: Official certification objective drift watch

acceptance_criteria.text: Create a repeatable objective-version audit process for A+ V15, Network+ N10-009, Security+ SY0-701, and future tracks.
Record official-source links, checked dates, exam retirement or draft-successor signals, and next review dates for each shipped track.
Add a durable ledger or audit entry for objective drift, including Security+ V8 draft-watch status.
Define what docs and app claims must change when a cert objective set is superseded, retired, or replaced.
Ensure content validation or release checklist points future agents to the drift-watch evidence before claiming current/objective-complete coverage.

source: Gap review: exam objective drift watch
